RURIMEGU-BURST_HEARTS.title: Burst
RURIMEGU-BURST_HEARTS.description: Increase the number of collected hearts, without exceeding the Burst Heart limit.
RURIMEGU-COLLECT_HEARTS.title: Collect
RURIMEGU-COLLECT_HEARTS.description: Deal damage to a random enemy equal to the number of hearts you have collected, then lose all collected hearts.
